title.en: Welcome to Apply to Chongqing University

content.zh: 详询重庆大学本科招生网
content.en: Visit the undergraduate admissions website for details

title.zh: 请勿使用多线程下载器

content.zh: 受带宽限制，IDM、aria2等多线程下载器不允许用于镜像站内容下载，请悉知。
content.en: Due to bandwidth limitations, multi-threaded downloaders such as IDM and aria2 are not allowed for downloading from the mirror site.
